_comment: Producer-side gate config (kit-only; consumers never run this). Check 1: every spine matching spinePattern in knowledgeDirs must be cited by the catalog or carry an exemption WITH a reason. Check 2: every spine (+ alsoStatusCheck files) declares a **Status:** line starting with a controlled token — the mechanical end of mixed status vocabulary (new spines conform on arrival; sealed headers are not cosmetically rewritten).

exempt.reason: DRAFT pending Principal Architect seal (added by Campus 2026-06-12, PR #68; also an open layer question — L2-house naming a product). Not yet an adoptable piece: its catalog section is added when Marcelo seals it (and the exemption removed then). Until then it must not block the catalog of adoptable pieces — but it is not silently absent either.

DRAFT pending Principal Architect seal (added 2026-06-13). Proposed registration as ADOPT piece #32 + inheritance-status row is deferred to the seal (governance numbering is the architect's call). Until sealed it must not block the catalog of adoptable pieces — but it is not silently absent either.

DRAFT — INTENTION handed from a consuming product (ViTo, HANDOFF 2026-06-17). Declared as an agnostic working agreement, NOT law. It is formalized by ViTo (front observability-closed-loop, P0->P1->P2); only on validated formalization does the Principal Architect promote it to a sealed canon and register it as an adoptable piece (exemption removed then). Until then it must not block the catalog — but it is not silently absent either.

DRAFT pending Principal Architect seal. The internal/external communication axis is proposed agnostic doctrine, but is not yet an adoptable piece; catalog registration waits for the seal. Until then it must not block the catalog of adoptable pieces — but it is not silently absent either.

DRAFT pending Principal Architect seal (D-060, supra-lift from a ViTo consumer finding: multi-source identity → atomic provisioning + mandatory drift-check; drift is a lockout risk). Spine-coverage checked before lift — not covered by CODER-SAFE-IDENTITY (executor/bot identity) or DB-SECURITY-BASELINE (Postgres data plane); this is the engine-agnostic application-layer complement. Not yet an adoptable piece; catalog registration + inheritance-status row wait for the seal (governance numbering is the architect's call). Until then it must not block the catalog of adoptable pieces — but it is not silently absent either.
